"May all the Gods who wish to be honoured with worship
condescend to come here, as well as the quarters, serpents, sages
and others that partake of the sacrificial offerings T' Having thus
invoked them to be present in the images, the priest should address
all of them thus : "Tomorrow you will go back after receiving wor-
ship and bestowing peace and prosperity on the king."
